scope: Scope: Full platform - Campaign, Voucher, Discount, Redemption, Organisation, Invitation, Credential, Audit Trail.

modules.name: Vouchera

key_abstractions.name: Campaign

properties.name: financials
invariants: status is derived from enabled and campaignWindow
voucher validity window must stay within campaignWindow

operations.name: deriveFinancials
invariants: financials are derived from redemptions only

properties.name: endAt
invariants: startAt must be before endAt

properties.name: totalAmount
invariants: totalAmount equals totalOrderAmount minus totalDiscountAmount

decisions: CampaignStatus is modeled as a constrained type shared by Campaign and Voucher status derivation.
CampaignFinancials remains derived and never owns persistence behavior.

key_abstractions.name: Voucher

properties.name: status
invariants: validityWindow must stay within campaign.campaignWindow
redemptionCount cannot exceed redemptionLimit

operations.name: recordSuccessfulRedemption
invariants: recordSuccessfulRedemption increments redemptionCount atomically with redemption creation

properties.name: endAt
invariants: startAt must be before endAt

properties.name: limit
invariants: limit must be positive

properties.name: planRestriction
invariants: succeededCount plus failedCount equals requestedCount

properties.name: trialPlan
invariants: trialPlan cannot be combined with any other plan in the same restriction

decisions: VoucherStatus is distinct from CampaignStatus because Voucher has Redeemed state in addition to campaign lifecycle states.
VoucherBatch is modeled as a lifecycle carrier rather than generation metadata on Voucher.

key_abstractions.name: Discount

properties.name: discountValue
invariants: exactly one discountType applies to each discount

properties.name: value
invariants: value must be non-negative

properties.name: value
invariants: value must be non-negative

decisions: DiscountType remains a constrained type that also routes to Affiliate Discount behavior.
DiscountValue is explicit to keep percentage and fixed amounts uniformly typed.

key_abstractions.name: Affiliate Discount

operations.name: resolveDiscount
invariants: at least one discount tier must exist
discount tier ranges must not overlap

operations.name: resolveAsDiscount
invariants: if no tier matches, resolved discount is zero

properties.name: upperBound
invariants: lowerBound must be less than or equal to upperBound

decisions: AffiliateVoucher is modeled as a Voucher subtype because it preserves voucher lifecycle while changing discount resolution behavior.
SubscriberRange is separated from DiscountTier to keep range invariants explicit and reusable.
No AffiliateDiscount class: once a tier resolves, the result is a standard Discount with discountType 'amount'; there is no separate affiliate discount concept post-resolution.

key_abstractions.name: Redemption

properties.name: createdAt
invariants: redemption is immutable once created

operations.name: applyVoucher
invariants: applyVoucher and voucher redemption count increment must commit in one transaction

properties.name: identifier
invariants: redeemer identity is external to platform membership identity

properties.name: value
invariants: value must be non-negative

decisions: OrderAmount is explicit because redemption arithmetic invariants depend on it directly.
RedemptionCount remains in this KA because its atomic update rule is coupled to redemption creation.

key_abstractions.name: Organisation

properties.name: membership
invariants: all campaigns, vouchers, redemptions, and memberships belong to exactly one organisation

operations.name: removeMembership
invariants: at least one owner membership must remain after removal

operations.name: revoke
invariants: a user may hold at most one membership at a time

operations.name: qualifies
invariants: every scoped data operation must carry a fully resolved organisation scope

decisions: Role is kept as a constrained type with behavior predicates instead of inheritance to avoid non-substitutable role subtypes.
Environment is modeled as data and not configuration because it participates in scope identity.
OrganisationScope is explicit because scope is passed and validated at every operation boundary.

key_abstractions.name: Invitation

properties.name: cancelledAt
invariants: only one active unaccepted invitation may exist per invitee per organisation

operations.name: accept
invariants: acceptance must atomically create membership and spend invitation token

properties.name: spentAt
invariants: plaintext token secret is never persisted

operations.name: spend
invariants: spent token cannot be used again

operations.name: complete
invariants: complete only when membership creation and invitation spend both succeed

decisions: Acceptance is modeled as an explicit state-carrier for the atomic join operation.
InvitationToken stays in Invitation KA despite similar hashing pattern to ApiKey because lifecycle is invitation-scoped.

key_abstractions.name: Credential

operations.name: recordUsage
invariants: plaintext key is never persisted or retrievable after issuance

operations.name: apply
invariants: pepper exists only in server configuration and never in database storage

references.title: API key lifecycle and hash strategy

decisions: ApiKey remains an environment-scoped credential through OrganisationScope.
Pepper is modeled explicitly to enforce security boundary constraints in the domain.

key_abstractions.name: Audit Trail

operations.name: query
invariants: audit trail is append-only

properties.name: createdAt
invariants: once written, an audit log entry cannot be modified or deleted

decisions: AuditTrail models both environment-scoped and organisation-level events to reflect cross-environment membership and invitation events.
FieldChange is a first-class concept because change details are query and compliance primitives.

operations.name: isCombinableWith
invariants: trial plan cannot be combined with any other plan on one voucher

decisions: TrialPlan is a Plan subtype because it preserves plan identity while adding exclusivity behavior.
Plan remains boundary-owned; Vouchera only consumes identifiers and eligibility semantics.

modules.intro:
Scope: Full platform - Campaign, Voucher, Discount, Redemption, Organisation, Invitation, Credential, Audit Trail.

**Core terms**:
- Campaign
- Voucher
- Discount
- Affiliate Discount
- Redemption
- Organisation
- Invitation
- Credential
- Audit Trail

**Key Abstractions (term grouping)**:
- **Campaign**: time-bound voucher container and aggregate financial view.
- **Voucher**: redeemable code and issuance constraints.
- **Discount**: discount definition and computation shape.
- **Affiliate Discount**: tier-based discount resolution from subscriber count.
- **Redemption**: immutable checkout usage record.
- **Organisation**: tenancy root, operator access, environment partition, and scope propagation.
- **Invitation**: time-limited join flow and acceptance.
- **Credential**: machine identity for API authentication.
- **Audit Trail**: immutable change history.
